arts.ttl: Dundee United think catching Rangers is ON as star smells blood – 'We've got a big chance'
arts.sum: Jim Goodwin's men are sitting third and could move to within seven points of second with a win at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Man Utd target FOUR signings amid Mainoo and Garnacho exit worry
arts.sum: Man Utd are determined to sign a new forward in 2025 and they have identified four key targets amid reports that Victor Osimhen and Viktor Gyokeres are unlikely to move clubs in January. Meanwhile, Man Utd are in talks to sign Lecce star Patrick Dorgu amid their search for a new left wing-back.

arts.ttl: Johnston's rise from Cove Rangers to Champions League
arts.sum: In December 2022, Max Johnston played the final game of a loan at Cove Rangers. Within two years later, he was lining up in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'Sources close to the player say': David Ornstein shares what he's now heard about Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford continues to be linked with a move away from Old Trafford. Rashford is ready to leave Manchester United, and a...

arts.ttl: Hurzeler calls for Brighton to be 'humble' after Man Utd win
arts.sum: Brighton boss Fabian Hurzeler praises side after they beat Manchester United 3-1 at Old Trafford, condemning them to a fourth defeat in five Premier League home games.

arts.ttl: We are maybe worst team in Man Utd history - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim calls his side "maybe the worst in Manchester United history," but refuses to change his ideals despite recent struggles.

arts.ttl: Why are Man Utd struggling in Amorim's system?
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Fara Williams discuss Manchester United's tactical struggles under new coach Ruben Amorim, as well as his stern criticism of his side after a 3-1 loss to Brighton.
Iceland goalkeeper Telma Ivarsdottir joins Rangers after leaving her homeland's league champions, Breidablik.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed Victor Osimhen discount opportunity
arts.sum: While Man Utd are interested in signing Osimhen in January, the Nigerian has previously admitted that he has no intention of leaving Galatasaray mid-season. Napoli have reportedly informed Manchester United that Victor Osimhen could be available for a cut-price fee if they are able to sign Alejandro Garnacho.
